summary: Cricket Ball-By-Ball Micro Betting extension tested successfully. All 42 backend tests pass (23 existing + 19 new). Frontend UI working correctly with all 8 betting outcomes, 5-second countdown timer, market lifecycle (open->suspended->settled), and bet history display. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection shows intermittent disconnection in browser console - may need reconnection logic for production
Demo mode uses MOCKED ball events (random generation) - real CricketData API integration would need API key
updated_files: /app/backend/cricket_micro_betting.py - Fixed datetime timezone comparison bug in place_micro_bet
/app/frontend/src/pages/Login.js - Fixed user_id not being passed after login
/app/backend/tests/test_cricket_micro_betting.py - Created new test file for micro betting
seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates markets automatically. Test bet placed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cricket Micro Betting extension fully tested. All APIs working: /api/cricket-micro/odds, /api/cricket-micro/demo/start|stop|status, /api/cricket-micro/markets/active, /api/cricket-micro/markets/match/{match_id}, /api/cricket-micro/bets. WebSocket at /ws/cricket-micro for real-time updates. Demo mode simulates ball events every 8 seconds with 5-second betting windows.

cricket_micro_betting.odds_endpoint: PASS - Returns all 8 outcomes with correct odds
cricket_micro_betting.demo_status: PASS - Returns running status and active market
cricket_micro_betting.markets_by_match: PASS - Returns all markets for a match
cricket_micro_betting.5_second_window: PASS - Betting window is exactly 5 seconds
cricket_micro_betting.bet_placement: PASS - Bets placed successfully when market is open
cricket_micro_betting.bet_history: PASS - User bet history retrieved correctly
cricket_micro_betting.market_settlement: PASS - Markets settled with results, bets updated

frontend_cricket_live.8_outcomes_display: PASS - All 8 betting outcomes displayed with odds
frontend_cricket_live.bet_slip: PASS - Bet slip appears when outcome selected
frontend_cricket_live.stake_input: PASS - Stake input and potential win calculation work
frontend_cricket_live.my_recent_bets: PASS - Bet history displayed in sidebar

no_side_effects.homepage: PASS - Hero section, betting table, sport tabs all working
no_side_effects.navigation: PASS - Cricket Live link in header, navigation works

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added timezone awareness check for closes_at datetime from MongoDB

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: user_id not included in user object after login, causing bet placement to fail
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Fetch full user data from /auth/me after login instead of using partial login response

mocked_apis.details: CricketData API is MOCKED using demo mode. Demo mode generates random ball results (dot, 1-6 runs, wicket, wide/noball) with realistic probability weights. Real API integration would require valid CRICKETDATA_API_KEY.
